previous_prompt_structure_detected: Elite Arsenal workflow patterns. Canonical JSON structure uses task_input_id, project, status, kernel_required, previous_mandate_gate (with violation_detected), objective, scope_lock (with restricted_files and rules), and named execution phases (e.g., phase_a_governance_restore). Prompts are typically classified as surgicalfix, thinkwithai, or refactorclean.
latest_prompt_structure_assessment: TRANSITIONAL_HYBRID. The NSSF prompt (P19_T9H) deviated from the canonical Elite Arsenal structure by using prompt_id instead of task_input_id, omitting the input status field, and using change_specification instead of named execution phases. While Kernel-compliant, it represents a drift from the high-structure orchestration seen in Phase 17/18.
